{{translated page|ja|Category:広陵町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:広陵町の建築物|version=61571734}} [[Category:Buildings in Nara Prefecture by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Kōryō, Nara]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Buildings in Nara Prefecture by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Kōryō, Nara]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:広陵町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine]]

revision.comment: Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "[[建築物]]" to "[[Building]]s"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28696241)
Text replacement - "Kushitama Hime-no-Mikoto Shrine" to "Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[奈良県]][[広陵町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:こうりようちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|こうりようちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:広陵町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:広陵町の建築物|version=61571734}}
